jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Jaypee Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jaypee Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
